headline: Ripple Is Now a Premier Member of the x402 Foundation, Alongside Visa and Mastercard
summary: AI agents are about to start spending money on their own, and whoever owns the rails they pay on owns a brand-new market. Ripple just took a seat at the table where those rules are being written, alongside Visa, Mastercard, and Google.

headline: Circle President Hails Company's 'Historic' Milestone—So Why Is CRCL Going Down?
summary: Circle President Heath Tarbert called the company's approval to establish a federal trust bank a "historic" milestone, making it the first U.S. digital asset company authorized to directly manage stablecoin reserves under federal oversight. Tarbert also urged Congress to pass the CLARITY Act, describing it as "more than financial regulation."
